title: Fyne-Finds Sand Beach Foldable Bucket, Rake, Spade, Sand Molds Tool Set 5Pc Plastic Garden Toys Kid Outdoor Playset for 18 months plus
features: Ideal for trips to the beach and summer holidays, this foldable bucket set takes up less room whilst traveling and still works perfectly.
Each set comes with One Foldable Bucket, One Spade, One Rake and Two Sand Moulds.
All made from Durable Plastic and Silicone.
description: Let your little ones explore, dig, and build with this 5-piece Sand Beach Toy Set—a colorful, safe, and fun outdoor playset designed for kids aged 1.5 years and up. Featuring a foldable bucket, spade, rake, and 2 fun sand molds, this lightweight plastic set is perfect for beach trips, garden play, or even indoor sensory activities!
